notes: The ONDO token has no blocklist, freeze, or seizure functions. Transfers are permissionless. Transfers were enabled in January 2024.

evidence.name: No Censorship Capability
evidence.summary:
`transferAllowed = true` (verified onchain, enabled January 2024).
No blacklist mapping.
No pause function for transfers.
No force transfer or seize functions.

The token contract has a `whenTransferAllowed` modifier but transfers are permanently enabled.
